name: "CodeQL WebView Vulnerability POC"

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  analyze:
    name: Analyze Medallia WebView Security
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      actions: read
      contents: read
      security-events: write

    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        language: [java]

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Initialize CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@v3
        with:
          languages: ${{ matrix.language }}
          queries: security-extended,security-and-quality
          config-file: ./.github/codeql/codeql-config.yml

      - name: Compile Java source
        run: |
          mkdir -p build
          # Compile all Java files, ignore Android dependencies (we just want analysis)
          find src -name "*.java" -exec javac -d build -sourcepath src {} + 2>/dev/null || true
          echo "Compilation attempted - CodeQL will analyze source regardless"

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v3
        with:
          category: "/language:${{matrix.language}}"
          output: sarif-results
          upload: true

      - name: Generate human-readable report
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "# CodeQL Analysis Report" > REPORT.md
          echo "" >> REPORT.md
          echo "## Date: $(date)" >> REPORT.md
          echo "## Commit: ${{ github.sha }}" >> REPORT.md
          echo "" >> REPORT.md
          echo "## Target: MedalliaWebView.java" >> REPORT.md
          echo "" >> REPORT.md
          echo "## Expected Vulnerabilities:" >> REPORT.md
          echo "- [ ] WebView setAllowFileAccess(true)" >> REPORT.md
          echo "- [ ] WebView setJavaScriptEnabled(true)" >> REPORT.md
          echo "- [ ] JavaScriptInterface exposed" >> REPORT.md
          echo "- [ ] Path traversal in URL construction" >> REPORT.md
          echo "" >> REPORT.md
          echo "Check the Security tab for actual results." >> REPORT.md

      - name: Upload SARIF results
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: codeql-sarif-results
          path: |
            sarif-results/
            *.sarif
            REPORT.md
          retention-days: 30

      - name: Upload to GitHub Security tab
        uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v3
        if: always()
        with:
          sarif_file: sarif-results/java.sarif
          category: medallia-webview-analysis
